title: Discuss how misinformation and selective narratives can undermine ethical governance. Explain how ethical communication can be ensured in public life.
description: Q7. Discuss how misinformation and selective narratives can undermine ethical governance. Explain how ethical communication can be ensured in public life. (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: TH Why the question The rise of misinformation and selective narratives in public discourse poses serious ethical challenges to governance, accountability and democratic integrity.
